caption: A man with white hair and a white beard is speaking at a podium against a textured, dark green wall featuring geometric, recessed patterns. He is dressed in a light-colored, long-sleeved shirt and a matching cream-colored Nehru vest. Two thin microphones extend toward him from the podium. To his right stands a tall, cylindrical glass vase containing thin branches and small red flowers at the base. As the scene progresses, the man maintains his position at the podium, shifting his gaze slightly and speaking. In the final sequence, he raises his left hand in a gesturing motion while continuing to speak, while his expression remains focused and serious. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in the scene.
